← Demo home

Playground

Stick figures, one heart — a MarkdyScript short story. (~24 seconds)

▶ markdy

Story acts

  1. 0s Lily appears; Bruno & Alex storm in from opposite sides
  2. 2.8s Both declare their love
  3. 6.3s Lily steps back — rivals charge
  4. 7.6s Fight! Punches and kicks fly
  5. 9.5s Alex is knocked out (falls sideways)
  6. 11.2s Bruno approaches with a flower…
  7. 13.4s Lily rejects him
  8. 17.4s Lily walks over to comfort Alex
  9. 22.4s Bruno watches alone from afar 😔
View MarkdyScript source 
scene width=900 height=440 fps=30 bg=#fff5f9

asset flower = image("/memes/flower.png")

# guy1 = Bruno (medium brown skin, right side)
# guy2 = Alex  (darker skin, left side)
# girl = Lily  (light skin, skirt variant)
actor guy1 = figure(#c68642)      at (720, 160)
actor guy2 = figure(#8d5524)      at (120, 160)
actor girl = figure(#fad4c0, f)   at (415, 160) opacity 0

# -- Introduction --
@0.0:  girl.fade_in(dur=0.7)
@0.8:  guy1.enter(from=right, dur=1.0)
@1.1:  guy2.enter(from=left,  dur=1.0)

# -- They spot her and declare love --
@2.8:  guy1.say("I love you! 😍", dur=1.3)
@3.3:  guy2.say("She's mine! 😤", dur=1.3)
@5.0:  girl.say("Oh my... 😳",   dur=1.2)

# -- Girl steps aside; rivals charge at each other --
@6.3:  girl.move(to=(800,160), dur=0.5, ease=out)
@6.8:  guy1.move(to=(435,160), dur=0.65, ease=in)
@6.8:  guy2.move(to=(360,160), dur=0.65, ease=in)

# -- Fight! Punch and kick --
@7.6:  guy1.punch(side=left,  dur=0.33)
@7.6:  guy2.punch(side=right, dur=0.33)
@7.7:  guy1.shake(intensity=9,  dur=0.38)
@7.7:  guy2.shake(intensity=9,  dur=0.38)

@8.3:  guy2.kick(side=right,  dur=0.38)
@8.3:  guy1.shake(intensity=7, dur=0.35)

@8.8:  guy1.punch(side=left,  dur=0.3)
@8.9:  guy2.shake(intensity=11, dur=0.4)

# -- Guy2 is knocked out (falls sideways) --
@9.5:  guy2.rotate(to=88, dur=0.4)
@9.6:  guy2.move(to=(360,290), dur=0.4, ease=in)
@9.8:  guy2.fade_out(dur=0.45)
@9.5:  guy1.say("I win! 💪", dur=1.5)

# -- Winner approaches girl --
@11.2: guy1.move(to=(570,160), dur=0.9, ease=out)
@12.4: guy1.throw(flower, to=girl, dur=0.8)

# -- Girl rejects --
@13.4: girl.say("No thank you. 🙅",    dur=1.9)
@13.5: girl.shake(intensity=6,         dur=0.45)
@15.6: guy1.say("But I fought! 😢",   dur=1.3)
@16.1: guy1.move(to=(830,160), dur=1.2, ease=in)

# -- Girl goes to comfort the fallen loser --
@17.4: guy2.fade_in(dur=0.8)
@18.0: girl.move(to=(430,160), dur=0.55, ease=out)
@18.8: girl.move(to=(348,272), dur=0.9,  ease=inout)
@20.0: girl.say("Are you okay? 💕",   dur=2.0)
@20.5: guy2.say("You came... 🥺",     dur=1.8)

# -- Heartbroken winner watches from far right --
@22.4: guy1.say("...why her 😔", dur=1.8)
